key: aula7_listening1_case
text: Here is my case. In my view, we should lower the commission for this one agency. They are the biggest player in the south. If we win them, we will open the whole region. And if other agencies see them join us, they will follow. Yes, we lose a little margin now, but if we think long term, this is the right call.

key: aula7_listening2_debate
text: I see your point, and it is a valid one. But I am afraid I have a reservation. If we lower the rate for one agency, the others will ask for the same deal. I am a bit on the fence. Maybe we can find common ground. If we offer the lower rate only for the first six months, we will protect our margin and still win them.
